Package com.iwedia.dtv.service

Class ServiceDescriptor

java.lang.Object
com.iwedia.dtv.service.ServiceDescriptor
All Implemented Interfaces:
android.os.Parcelable
public final class ServiceDescriptor extends Object implements android.os.Parcelable
Service descriptor class, it contains information about service.
